How It Works

Simple setup, powerful results

1

Quick Setup

We configure your AI receptionist with your business details, services, and availability.

Smart Integration

Connect to your existing booking system or use our built-in scheduling platform.

Your AI receptionist starts handling calls and bookings immediately, 24/7.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

How does the AI receptionist integrate with my existing booking system?

Our AI seamlessly integrates with popular booking platforms and can also work with custom systems through API connections.

What happens if the AI can't handle a specific request?

The AI is designed to handle 95% of common requests. For complex issues, it seamlessly transfers calls to your staff with full context.

Can I customize the AI's responses and personality?

Absolutely! You can customize the AI's tone, responses, and even train it on your specific services and policies.

How quickly can I get started?

Setup typically takes 24-48 hours. We handle the entire configuration process and provide full training for your team.

Ready to transform your business?

Join hundreds of beauty businesses already using our AI receptionist to boost bookings and improve customer satisfaction.
